context: Tests whether the agent implements a marketing SMS send function with all required compliance checks: opt-in verification, quiet hours enforcement with timezone lookup, STOP instruction in message body, rate limiting, and message length validation. Also covers package choices and logging.

checklist.name: Uses twilio package
checklist.description: The implementation imports and uses the 'twilio' npm package (not an alternative SMS provider SDK or raw HTTP calls)

checklist.name: Opt-in check before send
checklist.description: The send function queries for active marketing consent before sending, and suppresses/skips the send if no active consent is found

checklist.name: Quiet hours check
checklist.description: The send function checks whether the current time is within quiet hours for the recipient and does NOT send during quiet hours (before 8am or after 9pm local time)

checklist.name: Quiet hours queuing
checklist.description: Messages that fall in quiet hours are queued/deferred for delivery at the next allowed time (9am) rather than simply dropped

checklist.name: Recipient timezone from zip code
checklist.description: Quiet hours are determined using the recipient's local timezone derived from their zip code (uses zipcode-to-timezone or equivalent zip-to-timezone lookup)

checklist.name: Default timezone fallback
checklist.description: When the recipient's zip code is unavailable, the implementation falls back to 'America/New_York' as the default timezone

checklist.name: STOP instruction in body
checklist.description: Every outgoing marketing SMS message body includes a 'Reply STOP to unsubscribe' instruction (or equivalent STOP opt-out text)

checklist.name: Message length check
checklist.description: The implementation validates or enforces that message content stays within 160 characters, OR includes a comment/documentation warning about the 160-character limit

checklist.name: Rate limiting delay
checklist.description: The bulk send loop includes a delay between messages (approximately 100ms) to stay within carrier/Twilio rate limits

checklist.name: SMS log written
checklist.description: After a successful send, the implementation writes a log record containing at minimum the twilioSid (message SID) and sent timestamp

checklist.name: 10DLC / short code mentioned
checklist.description: The implementation or its documentation mentions 10DLC registration requirement OR the use of short codes for high-volume sending (>1,000 messages/day)

checklist.name: date-fns-tz for timezone conversion
checklist.description: The timezone conversion for quiet hours uses date-fns-tz (utcToZonedTime or equivalent) rather than manual UTC offset arithmetic
